name: Simple Curried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless, skinless Chicken Breasts (or Thighs)
1 cup Rinsed Whole Seedless Green Grapes
1/4 cup Chopped Unsalted Dry Roasted Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and cube the apple.
2. If using thighs, cut them into 1-inch pieces.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large, deep skillet with cover.
4. Add onions, carrots, and garlic. Cook, stirring over medium heat until vegetables are golden, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in apple. Transfer vegetables to a side dish.
6. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon oil to the skillet. Add chicken and cook over medium-high heat just until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
7. Sprinkle curry powder, cumin, ginger, cayenne, salt, and pepper over the chicken. Stir to blend well.
8. Add reserved cooked vegetables, broth, grapes, and raisins. Cover and cook over low heat, stirring once or twice, just until flavors are blended and chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
9. Remove skillet from heat. Gradually stir in yogurt.
10. Spoon the chicken mixture over hot cooked rice and sprinkle with peanuts.
Makes 4 servings.
